global_rules: CRITICAL: The answer is NEVER encoded in the visual. Visuals show setup only.
All coordinate planes use grid spacing of 1 unit unless labeled otherwise.
All angles are labeled with degree symbol unless explicitly stated in radians.
Diagrams show given information only — no solution marks, no highlighted correct answer.
Color use: black for figure, blue for given lengths, red for unknown (labeled with variable only).
All visuals must be renderable in SVG format for web delivery.

visual_specs.title: Real Number Classification — Number Line
visual_specs.description: A number line from -3 to 3 with labeled points for classification. Points are placed but NOT labeled as rational/irrational.

elements.label_format: decimal approximation only — no rational/irrational label

visual_specs.format_hint: Multiple choice: Is this point rational or irrational?

visual_specs.title: Parabola — Standard Form (Complete the Square)
visual_specs.description: Graph of quadratic in standard form. Shows the parabola shape and labeled x-intercepts. Vertex is NOT marked — student must find it.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded response or MC: What is the vertex? What is the minimum/maximum value?

visual_specs.title: Linear-Quadratic System — Graphical Solution
visual_specs.description: Both functions graphed. Intersection points are shown as OPEN dots only — coordinates NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded response: What are the x-coordinates of the intersection points?

visual_specs.title: Quadratic Inequality — Boundary Parabola
visual_specs.description: Parabola shown as boundary (solid or dashed depending on inequality type). Shading region is NOT shown — student determines which region.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC or interval notation: What is the solution set?

visual_specs.title: System of Inequalities — Boundaries Only
visual_specs.description: Two boundary curves/lines shown (one parabola, one line). NO shading shown. Student must identify which region satisfies both.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which labeled point is in the solution region?

visual_specs.title: Quadratic Key Features — Unlabeled Graph
visual_specs.description: Parabola shown with x-intercepts and y-intercept visible. Vertex is visible but NOT labeled with coordinates. Axis of symmetry shown as dashed.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Identify the vertex / axis of symmetry / range

visual_specs.title: Graph Quadratic from Equation — Blank Grid
visual_specs.description: Empty coordinate plane with labeled axes. Student graphs the function; no curve shown.
visual_specs.format_hint: Graph-match: Which of these graphs matches f(x) = [equation]?

visual_specs.title: Square Root Function — Domain/Range from Graph
visual_specs.description: Graph of a square root function shown. Start point visible but NOT labeled. Curve extends in correct direction.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: What is the domain / range of this function?

visual_specs.title: Inverse Variation Function Graph
visual_specs.description: Hyperbola shown in first and third quadrants (or first and second). Asymptotes shown as dashed lines but NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Identify the equation / domain / range

visual_specs.title: Inverse Function — Reflection Over y=x
visual_specs.description: Original function graphed. Line y=x shown as dashed. Reflected curve (inverse) shown as dotted — but WHICH is f and which is f⁻¹ is the question.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which equation represents Curve 2 (the inverse)?

visual_specs.title: Translation on Coordinate Plane
visual_specs.description: Pre-image polygon shown. Image NOT shown. Translation vector given in the question.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded or MC: What are the coordinates of the image vertices?

visual_specs.title: Reflection on Coordinate Plane
visual_specs.description: Triangle shown with one axis of reflection marked. Image NOT drawn.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC or coordinate entry: Find the image A'B'C'

visual_specs.title: Rotation on Coordinate Plane
visual_specs.description: Pre-image triangle shown. Center of rotation (origin) marked. Angle of rotation given in question only.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC or coordinate entry: Find the rotated image P'Q'R'

visual_specs.title: Congruent Figures via Rigid Motion
visual_specs.description: Two congruent figures shown on coordinate plane. Question asks which transformation maps one to the other.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which transformation(s) map △EGF to △E'G'F'?

visual_specs.title: Dilation — Pre-Image Only
visual_specs.description: Pre-image shown centered at origin or given point. Scale factor given in question. Image NOT drawn.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC or coordinate entry: Find the image after dilation by k = [value]

visual_specs.title: Similar Triangles — Missing Side
visual_specs.description: Two similar triangles shown side by side. One side of the second triangle is marked with '?' (red). All other known measurements labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded response: Find the length of EF

visual_specs.title: Geometric Mean in Right Triangle
visual_specs.description: Right triangle with altitude drawn to hypotenuse. Three sub-triangles visible. Segments labeled with given values; unknown labeled '?'.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded response: Find the length of the altitude CD

visual_specs.title: 45-45-90 Triangle — Find Missing Side
visual_specs.description: Isosceles right triangle with one known side labeled. Unknown sides labeled with variables only.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: Find x or h. Leave in simplified radical form.

visual_specs.title: 30-60-90 Triangle — Find Missing Side
visual_specs.description: 30-60-90 triangle with one known measurement. Unknown sides labeled with variables. Angles labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: Find the indicated side. Leave in simplified radical form.

visual_specs.title: Trig Ratios — Labeled Right Triangle
visual_specs.description: Right triangle with legs and hypotenuse labeled numerically. Angle A labeled but trig values NOT written on diagram.

elements.vertices: A (angle of interest), B (right angle), C

visual_specs.format_hint: MC: What is sin(A) / cos(A) / tan(A)?

visual_specs.title: Angle of Elevation/Depression
visual_specs.description: Diagram with horizontal reference line, object (tree/cliff/building), observer, and angle marked. Triangle formed but side lengths NOT labeled (they are given in question text only).
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: Find the height h to the nearest foot.

visual_specs.title: Central Angle and Arc
visual_specs.description: Circle with center O. Two radii drawn forming central angle. Arc highlighted in blue. Angle measure labeled at center. Arc measure NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: What is the measure of arc AB?

visual_specs.title: Inscribed Angle
visual_specs.description: Circle with inscribed angle and intercepted arc. Arc measure labeled, inscribed angle value NOT labeled.

elements.note: Inscribed angle vertex is clearly on the circle, not center

visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: What is the measure of the inscribed angle?

visual_specs.title: Arc Length — Sector Diagram
visual_specs.description: Circle with sector highlighted. Radius labeled, central angle labeled. Arc length formula not shown. Arc length NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: Find the arc length. Leave answer in terms of π or as decimal.

visual_specs.title: Circle on Coordinate Plane
visual_specs.description: Coordinate plane with circle plotted. Center and radius visible but NOT labeled with values. Student must identify equation.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which equation represents this circle?

visual_specs.title: Intersecting Chords Inside Circle
visual_specs.description: Circle with two chords crossing inside. Segments labeled with given values. One segment labeled '?'.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: Find PD using the intersecting chords theorem.

visual_specs.title: Secant/Tangent Angle from External Point
visual_specs.description: External point with two secants drawn. Arcs labeled, external angle NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: Find the measure of angle P.

visual_specs.title: Side-by-Side Box Plots — Compare Distributions
visual_specs.description: Two box plots on same scale. Labels show groups. Five-number summaries NOT listed — student reads from plot.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which statement about the distributions is true?

visual_specs.title: Two-Way Frequency Table
visual_specs.description: Table with two categorical variables. Row and column totals shown. Some cells blank (student must calculate).
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded or MC: Find joint frequency / conditional probability

visual_specs.title: Altitude to Hypotenuse — Three Triangles
visual_specs.description: Right triangle with altitude drawn from right angle to hypotenuse. Three triangles visible. Two lengths labeled, one unknown.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: Find CD using the geometric mean relationship.

visual_specs.title: Triangle Congruence Criteria
visual_specs.description: Two triangles shown. Tick marks indicate equal sides; arc marks indicate equal angles. No measurements given — student identifies the criterion.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which congruence criterion (SSS/SAS/ASA/AAS/HL) applies?

visual_specs.title: Graphical Solution — Two Functions
visual_specs.description: Two functions graphed on same axes. Intersection point(s) shown as OPEN dots only, coordinates NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: What are the x-values where f(x) = g(x)?
